title: taraxacum hispanicum
intro: Taraxacum hispanicum, also known as the Spanish dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum hispanicum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
